result:
Build is fully green (exit 0, no `.bak` leftovers). Summary of changes:

- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now takes `(struct os_time *t, int clock_source)`.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to match; `clock_source` is currently unused (any value behaves like 0).
- All ~30 call sites across the repo (wpa_supplicant, src/ap, src/eap_*, src/pae, src/tls, src/radius, src/wps, src/utils, src/crypto, src/eapol_auth) updated to pass `0` as the second argument, including the internal call in `os_win32.c` (its own definition was left untouched since that backend isn't part of this build and wasn't in scope).
- `wpa_supplicant/ make` completes with exit code 0.
